CVE-2023-4256.title: Within tcpreplay's tcprewrite, a double free vulnerability has be ...
CVE-2023-4256.description: Within tcpreplay's tcprewrite, a double free vulnerability has been identified in the tcpedit_dlt_cleanup() function within plugins/dlt_plugins.c. This vulnerability can be exploited by supplying a specifically crafted file to the tcprewrite binary. This flaw enables a local attacker to initiate a Denial of Service (DoS) attack.
